name: Adelaide Zoo
desc: Join the feeding experience to get up close and personal with kangaroos at Adelaide Zoo

name: Cleland Wildlife Park
desc: There are very few animal enclosures at Cleland. Most animals live in natural habitat and you can get up close for great photos.

name: Gorge Wildlife Park
desc: Walk amongst and feed the Kangaroos and Wallabies including the white (albino) varieties.

name: Kangaroo Island
desc: Home to tens of thousands of wild kangaroos on a pristine island.

name: Grampians National Park
desc: Grey kangaroos roam freely through this stunning mountain landscape.

name: Namadgi National Park
desc: Eastern grey kangaroos are abundant near Canberra.

name: Pebbly Beach, NSW
desc: Famous for kangaroos lounging on the beach at sunrise.

name: Cape Hillsborough
desc: Wallabies and kangaroos visit the beach at dawn.

name: Lucky Bay, WA
desc: Kangaroos sunbathe on Australia's whitest sand beach.

name: Murramarang National Park
desc: Kangaroos graze on coastal campsite lawns.

desc: Red kangaroos roam the red desert around Uluru.

name: Outback Queensland

desc: Kangaroos in a walk-through exhibit.
